item.title: Upstream and Remote-Tracking Branches
item.description: Upstream and Remote-Tracking Branches Upstream branches are the branches on the remote repository e.g. main Remote tracking branches are the branches on the local repository which mirrors their corresponding upstream branches e.g.

item.title: Editing Past Commits
item.description: Editing Past Commits Imagine we have a commit graph like this: A---B---C (feature, origin/feature) and we want to edit the commit B. Rebasing a Temporary Branch amending a single file in a past commit in git - Stack Overflow Create a temporary branch e.g.
